issues.title: After the Moonshot, the Moon Work Begins
issues.dek: Artemis II was NASA's first crewed lunar flyby in more than 50 years: 9 days, 1 hour, 32 minutes; four astronauts; SLS from Pad 39B; Orion around the Moon; Pacific recovery on April 10, 2026.
issues.imageAlt: Editorial collage of Artemis lunar infrastructure, Orion-like spacecraft, mission control, and a distant Mars horizon.

issues.title: The Remote Work List
issues.dek: Ten places ranked by factual work infrastructure: transit, airports, universities, labs, studios, employers, cultural institutions, outdoor access, and real tradeoffs.
issues.imageAlt: Editorial collage of remote work scenes across the United States.

issues.title: The Makers' Register
issues.dek: A register of builders tied to specific turning points: Apple in 1976, Facebook in 2004, iPhone in 2007, Falcon 9 reuse in 2017, ChatGPT in 2022, and the GPU supply chain underneath it all.
issues.imageAlt: Engraved semiconductor plate with wafer forms, circuit traces, and laboratory archive paper.

issues.title: The Automation Ledger
issues.kicker: Systems desk / Work, robots, and agents
issues.dek: A dense newspaper spread on automation moving through work, warehouses, robotaxis, labs, defense rooms, homes, humanoids, and AI agents.
issues.imageAlt: Cross-section image of automated city systems, including warehouse robots, lab automation, robotaxis, farm drones, home robots, and data center controls.
